entryCriteria: Phase 1 baseline accepted as the first vNext landing zone.
exitCriteria: Phase 1 was merged to main and treated as the stable baseline.
freezeTriggers: Any new package request after Phase 1 closeout.
deferredToNextPhaseRules: Any new operating-model or runtime-governance work moves to Phase 2.

entryCriteria: Phase 1 is closed and merged to main.
Package-first CLI and tracked workflow docs exist in the repository.
Review packet and promotion decision artifacts are wired into repository CI.
exitCriteria: Package-first delivery is the default tracked workflow.
Verification report can trace module promotion back to explicit evidence artifacts.
New package creation can be frozen via tracked phase policy without ad hoc transcript rules.
closeoutCriteria: Promotion gate semantics are frozen as pass, held, block, or unavailable.
Capability truth drift is blocked in CI.
A single Phase 2 closeout report exists for release-owner and antigravity review.
freezeTriggers: Release stabilization requires stopping new package creation.
Evidence drift appears between scorecard, live verify, and verification report.
Phase owner sets status to closeout-candidate, frozen, or closed in this file.
promotionTriggers: A promotion decision artifact exists for the affected module.
The verification report references the evidence bundle used for the decision.
The decision source is recorded as antigravity, release owner, or equivalent policy authority.
deferredToNextPhaseRules: Cross-lane work touching more than two owner lanes must be split into prerequisite packages.
Surface-expansion work without bounded success criteria must stay out of the current package.
Unverified maturity changes must remain deferred until a promotion decision artifact exists.
overrideRules: Only a tracked closeout or reopen package may change status or allowNewPackages for Phase 2.
Emergency overrides must be committed to this file before any new Phase 2 package is opened.
